name: portfolio

scripts.build-assets: npm run build-icon && npm run build-fonts && npm run build-qr
scripts.prebuild: npm run build-assets && npm run sync-citations && npm run sync-bibtex
scripts.build: astro build && node scripts/inject-sitemap-xsl.mjs && pagefind --site dist && node scripts/build-cv-pdf.mjs

_overridesNote: yaml >=2.8.3 cuts GHSA-48c2-rrv3-qjmp (stack overflow) which volar-service-yaml@0.0.70 still pins via yaml-language-server (dev-only, astro check). tmp >=0.2.4 cuts GHSA-52f5-9888-hmc6 (symlink) which @lhci/cli still pins via inquirer->external-editor (dev-only, Lighthouse CI). Remove each override once the corresponding upstream ships a fixed dep tree.
